name: Motion Energy (Quantity of Motion)
description: Mean squared velocity = kinetic-energy-like.

name: Jerk (rate of change of acceleration)
description: Third-order finite diff of joint angles.

name: Max Speed
description: Peak absolute dof velocity (any joint, any time).

name: Mean Speed
description: Mean absolute dof velocity across all joints + time.

name: Head Height (抬头)
description: Root z height (standing tall).

name: Posture Openness (simple, arm-only)
description: Mean absolute arm joint angle (larger = more open).

name: Space Occupancy (path length)
description: Total translation path length.

name: Left-Right Symmetry
description: 1 - normalized absolute difference between left/right arm joint angles.

name: Rhythmicity
description: Autocorrelation peak of mean velocity magnitude.

name: Smoothness / Fluidity
description: Inverse of normalized jerk — higher = smoother = positive valence.

name: Vertical Movement (net z)
description: Net z displacement over primitive.

name: Movement Range / Amplitude
description: Mean per-joint (max - min) angle over the primitive.

name: Directness of Trajectory
description: Net displacement / path length. 1 = straight line, <1 = meandering.

name: Acceleration Magnitude
description: Mean absolute second difference of joint angles.

name: Gait Tempo / Step Frequency
description: Dominant frequency of foot contact oscillation (Hz).

name: Bounding Box Volume (Expansiveness)
description: Volume of 3D bounding box of all link positions (pelvis-local).

name: Step Height
description: Peak ankle z during swing phase.

name: Step Length
description: Distance between consecutive foot contacts.

name: Body Contraction/Expansion Index
sources: Camurri 2003 contraction index; Karg §7.3 spatial extent
description: Mean pelvis-to-link distance (higher = more open pose, higher V).

name: Directional Change (head/torso)
description: Standard deviation of yaw_delta (how much direction wobbles).

name: Leaning Forward Duration Ratio
description: Fraction of frames where spine pitch > threshold (leaning forward).

name: Acceleration Peak (Force Proxy)
description: Max magnitude of per-frame acceleration.

name: Motion Activation (zero-crossing rate)
description: Rate at which joint velocity crosses zero (direction changes).

name: Speed Variance (Tempo Changes)
description: Variance of speed over time.

name: Stride Time
description: Average time between heel strikes (derived from gait_tempo).

name: Body Size / Pose Volume
description: Duplicate of bbox_volume at finer granularity.

name: Force / Weight
description: Shared definition with accel_peak (Tier 2 Arousal).

name: Arm Swing During Gait
description: Shoulder ROM restricted to during foot-contact cycles.

name: Arms Away From Torso Duration
description: Mean distance from hand to torso center.

name: Arms Up Frequency
description: Fraction of frames where shoulder pitch is above some threshold (arms raised).

name: Shoulder Range of Motion
description: Range of shoulder pitch over primitive.

name: Slumped Posture (spine angle sustained)
description: Sustained forward pitch of spine/torso.

name: Movement Duration
description: Primitive windows fixed at 0.33s in DART — no variation to learn from.

name: Muscle Tension
description: Requires EMG or joint stiffness estimation — not feasible with kinematic only.

name: Head Orientation Changes
description: Variability in head yaw/pitch (currently we have no explicit head FK output).

name: BAP 141 Behavioural Categories
description: Requires human-annotated categorical labels (emblems, illustrators...).

name: Delsarte 9 Laws of Movement
description: Altitude / Force / Sequence etc. Too abstract, mapped to Tier 1-3 above.

name: Laban Effort · Flow (Free/Bound)
description: Approximated by `smoothness`.

name: Laban Effort · Space (Indirect/Direct)
description: Approximated by `directness` feature.

name: Laban Effort · Time (Sustained/Sudden)
description: Approximated by `jerk_l2` + `speed_variance`.

name: Laban Effort · Weight (Light/Strong)
description: Approximated by `accel_peak`.
